records.question: Which appellations are located in the county of Santa Barbara?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
WHERE appellations.county = 'Santa Barbara'
records.pred_sql: SELECT No FROM appellations WHERE County = 'Santa Barbara'

records.question: Which appellations in Sonoma County, California are part of the North Coast area and are designated as AVA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
WHERE appellations.area = 'North Coast' AND appellations.isava = 'Yes' AND appellations.county = 'Sonoma' AND appellations.state = 'California'
records.pred_sql: SELECT No FROM appellations WHERE County = 'Sonoma County' AND State = 'California' AND Area = 'North Coast' AND isAVA = 'Yes'

records.question: Which appellations include the wine named De La Guerra made from white grapes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
JOIN grapes ON wine.grape = grapes.grape
WHERE wine.name = 'De La Guerra' AND grapes.color = 'White'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.No FROM appellations AS T1 INNER JOIN wine AS T2 ON T1.Appelation = T2.Appelation INNER JOIN grapes AS T3 ON T2.Grape = T3.Grape WHERE T2.Name = 'De La Guerra' AND T3.Color = 'White'

records.question: What appellations are located in San Benito county?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
WHERE appellations.county = 'San Benito'
records.pred_sql: SELECT No FROM appellations WHERE County = 'San Benito'

records.question: Which appellations that are AVA are located in Monterey County within the Central Coast area of California?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
WHERE appellations.isava = 'Yes' AND appellations.area = 'Central Coast' AND appellations.county = 'Monterey' AND appellations.state = 'California'
records.pred_sql: SELECT No FROM appellations WHERE isAVA = 'Yes' AND County = 'Monterey' AND Area = 'Central Coast' AND State = 'CA'

records.question: Which appellations in California have an area of California, no county specified, and include wines from Herman Story made in California since 2008 with a score of at least 93?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
WHERE wine.winery = 'Herman Story' AND appellations.county = 'N/A' AND wine.score >= 93 AND wine.state = 'California' AND wine.year >= 2008 AND appellations.area = 'California'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.No FROM appellations AS T1 INNER JOIN wine AS T2 ON T1.Appelation = T2.Appelation WHERE T1.State = 'California' AND T1.Area = 'California' AND (T1.County IS NULL OR T1.County = '') AND T2.Winery = 'Herman Story' AND T2.State = 'California' AND T2.Year >= 2008 AND T2.Score >= 93

records.question: Which appellations have wines from California with a score of exactly 89, priced at least 40 dollars, and exactly 456 cases produced?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
WHERE wine.score = 89 AND wine.state = 'California' AND wine.price >= 40 AND wine.cases = 456
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.No FROM appellations AS T1 INNER JOIN wine AS T2 ON T1.Appelation = T2.Appelation WHERE T2.State = 'CA' AND T2.Score = 89 AND T2.Price >= 40 AND T2.Cases = 456

records.question: Which appellations in California have wines produced by the Martinelli winery?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
WHERE appellations.state = 'California' AND wine.winery = 'Martinelli'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.No FROM appellations AS T1 INNER JOIN wine AS T2 ON T1.Appelation = T2.Appelation WHERE T1.State = 'CA' AND T2.Winery = 'Martinelli'

records.question: Which appellations in the Santa Cruz Mountains that are AVA have wines made from red grapes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
JOIN grapes ON wine.grape = grapes.grape
WHERE grapes.color = 'Red' AND appellations.area = 'Santa Cruz Mountains' AND appellations.isava = 'Yes'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.No FROM appellations AS T1 INNER JOIN wine AS T2 ON T1.Appelation = T2.Appelation INNER JOIN grapes AS T3 ON T2.Grape = T3.Grape WHERE T1.Appelation = 'Santa Cruz Mountains' AND T1.isAVA = 'Yes' AND T3.Color = 'Red'

records.question: Where are the appellations in Napa County, North Coast, California, that have wines priced at most 48 with a score no more than 92 made from white grapes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT appellations.no FROM appellations
JOIN wine ON appellations.appelation = wine.appelation
JOIN grapes ON wine.grape = grapes.grape
WHERE appellations.state = 'California' AND wine.price <= 48 AND grapes.color = 'White' AND wine.score <= 92 AND appellations.area = 'North Coast' AND appellations.county = 'Napa'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.No FROM appellations AS T1 INNER JOIN wine AS T2 ON T1.Appelation = T2.Appelation INNER JOIN grapes AS T3 ON T2.Grape = T3.Grape WHERE T1.County = 'Napa County' AND T1.Area = 'North Coast' AND T1.State = 'California' AND T2.Price <= 48 AND T2.Score <= 92 AND T3.Color = 'White'
